name: Atomic Eagle Limited
description: Atomic Eagle Limited is an Australian-based mineral exploration company focused on the discovery and development of high-grade uranium deposits. The company holds a significant land position in the world-class Athabasca Basin in Saskatchewan, Canada, which is renowned for hosting the highest-grade uranium mines globally. Atomic Eagle's primary focus is on its flagship projects where it utilizes modern geophysical techniques and targeted drilling programs to identify Tier-1 uranium assets. The company is committed to sustainable exploration practices and aims to contribute to the global transition toward clean energy through the supply of uranium.
